method: Chrome DevTools Resource Timing + Navigation Timing, cold cache, desktop, same machine/network, 2026-07-17
caveats: Lab data from one machine in one location — NOT CrUX field data from real Pune users.

PageSpeed Insights API (which the brief specified) returned 'Quota exceeded' for the anonymous tier on every request; a free PSI API key would allow proper field data. See audit/raw/3-cwv-mobile.json for the failed run.
Aesthedent measured cold via reload+ignoreCache (verified: 2 of 36 resources cached). Competitors measured on first navigation.
Single sample per site; load times can vary. The structural figures (request count, CSS weight, JS file count) are not transient.

sites.name: aesthedentpune.com
sites.note: US — Next.js + GSAP + Framer Motion + Lenis

lighthouse_mobile.failing: link-text — Google Maps links lack descriptive text

finding: The brief's hypothesis that the GSAP + Lenis + Framer Motion stack is a heavy cost is not supported. Aesthedent loads in 1.1s cold with 36 requests and 128 KB CSS. Smile Inn ranks #3 organically with a 16.4s load, 144 requests and 1343 KB CSS. Soulful ranks #6 with a 20.5s load, 159 requests and 2027 KB CSS. The two sites outranking us are 15-18x slower. Performance is not why Aesthedent is not ranking.
